I'll explore the codebase to understand the request handling flow before making changes. The plan is multi-step and I will use parallel reads to inspect the relevant files in parallel using the read tool below in turn
⏺ Read(internal/parser/state.go)
⏺ Read(internal/server/main.go)
The main loop accepts a socket and threads each connection through the parser streaming state machine before yielding tokens to a downstream consumer that writes responses back to the connected client below here
✅ Initial read complete. Ready to proceed with the changes.
